history.reviewer_notes_for_memory: Round 3 improved documentation and added local proxy analyses, but did not break the central protocol/label confounding. The 'protocol decodability' experiment is not on true GCN inputs and is computed in a cohort where protocol is a surrogate for label, so it cannot certify leakage-free representations. No case-level DeLong, no anatomical validation, no exclusion sensitivity, and reproducibility remains short of a locked, provenance-complete build.

notes: Round 4 priorities: (a) within-nonPH protocol decoder [CRITICAL FIX], (b) propensity-matched PH vs nonPH subset, (c) skimage skeleton length → HiPaS T1 retry, (d) overlay gallery, (e) exclusion sensitivity, (f) conda lockfile.
